name: Web Application Compromise to Data Exfiltration
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of a public-facing web application leading to backend access and data exfiltration
root_objective: Exfiltrate sensitive customer data from the web application

nodes.title: Exfiltrate Customer Data via Web App
nodes.description: Attacker achieves unauthorized extraction of sensitive customer data from the application and its backend systems

nodes.title: Exploit Authentication Weakness
nodes.description: Bypass or subvert authentication mechanisms to gain unauthorized access

nodes.title: Credential Stuffing Attack
nodes.description: Use leaked credential databases to attempt login with known username/password combinations

nodes.title: Brute Force MFA Bypass
nodes.description: Exploit weak MFA implementation such as rate limit absence or predictable TOTP seeds

nodes.title: Session Token Hijacking
nodes.description: Steal session tokens via XSS, network interception, or insecure cookie configuration

nodes.title: Exploit Injection Vulnerability
nodes.description: Inject malicious payloads via application input fields to access backend data

nodes.title: SQL Injection on Search/Filter
nodes.description: Inject SQL via application search, filter, or sorting parameters to extract database contents

nodes.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
nodes.description: Exploit URL-fetching functionality to access internal services, cloud metadata, or backend APIs

nodes.title: Exploit Broken Access Control
nodes.description: Access other users' data or admin functions through authorization flaws

nodes.title: IDOR on User Data Endpoints
nodes.description: Manipulate object identifiers in API requests to access other users' records

nodes.title: Privilege Escalation to Admin
nodes.description: Exploit role assignment flaws to escalate from regular user to administrator

nodes.title: Pivot to Backend Infrastructure
nodes.description: Use web application as a pivot point to access backend databases, cloud services, or internal APIs

nodes.title: Achieve Code Execution on App Server
nodes.description: Gain ability to execute arbitrary code on the web application server via file upload, deserialization, or template injection

nodes.title: Access Cloud Metadata Service
nodes.description: Query cloud instance metadata endpoint (e.g., 169.254.169.254) to obtain IAM credentials
